citation.description: create_cli passes creation_channel='cli'; idea_cli (idea.py:67), session_log_cli (session_log.py:245,249), identity_cli (identity.py:678) all pass 'cli'. Test file tests/interfaces/facades/test_creation_channel.py exists with cli-keyed tests.

criteria.criterion: CLI rebar create and idea/session-log/identity creation persist creation_channel=cli in CREATE.data and return cli through show/list state.

citation.description: MCP create_ticket passes _creation_channel='mcp' (line 69), create_identity (line 91), create_idea (line 104), log_session (line 157). Test file has mcp-keyed tests.

criteria.criterion: MCP create_ticket, create_idea, create_identity, and first-use log_session persist and return creation_channel=mcp.

citation.description: create_ticket (line 91), idea (line 144), create_identity (line 191), append_session_log (line 502), start_session_log (line 538) all default _creation_channel='python'. Test has python-keyed tests.

criteria.criterion: Direct Python create_ticket, idea, create_identity, append_session_log, and start_session_log persist and return creation_channel=python.

citation.description: validate_creation_channel rejects 'unknown' (with 'projection-only' message) and out-of-enum values. _processors.py process_create (line 194) defaults to 'unknown' for legacy CREATE with no channel; _project_legacy_creation_channel (line 246) sets 'unknown' without inferred marker unless legacy-Jira signature matches.

criteria.criterion: New local writers reject unknown or values outside the closed enum. A legacy CREATE with no channel provisionally reduces to unknown without creation_channel_inferred.

citation.description: _IMMUTABLE_EDIT_FIELDS = frozenset({'creation_channel', 'creation_channel_inferred'}) defined at line 536; process_edit skips fields in this set at line 553. Test has immutable-keyed tests.

criteria.criterion: An EDIT.fields payload containing creation_channel or creation_channel_inferred is skipped by the _IMMUTABLE_EDIT_FIELDS guard in process_edit; STATUS, LINK, COMMENT, and TAG_DELTA processors likewise never assign genesis provenance.

citation.description: CreationChannel = Literal['cli','mcp','python','jira','import','unknown'] (line 26); TicketState.creation_channel: NotRequired[CreationChannel] (line 117); creation_channel_inferred: NotRequired[Literal[True]] (line 118). gen_types.py has const handler (gen_types.py:126-128). Both docs/event-schema.md and docs/output-schemas.md document all 6 values and creation_channel_inferred. test_creation_channel_vocabulary.py pins runtime/schema sync.

criteria.criterion: ticket_state JSON Schema, generated TicketState types, runtime show/list/search/export outputs, plus docs expose the same six-value enum and true-only optional inference marker; gen_types renders const true as Literal[True].

citation.description: test_canonical_event_bytes.py, test_library.py, test_cli.py, test_mcp.py all exist in the repository; these are the regression suites the AC points to.

criteria.criterion: Existing creation behavior, error semantics, and event canonicalization remain unchanged apart from the additive keys.
